name: rt-mcp
description: Henter og søker i RT-saker fra Sikt/Sigma2s Request Tracker

tools.name: list_open_tickets
tools.description: Hent åpne RT-saker for en bruker (standard: frgri/Frode)

tools.name: list_team_tickets
tools.description: Hent åpne RT-saker for hele teamet

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Hent metadata for én RT-sak (emne, status, kø, eier)

tools.name: get_ticket_history
tools.description: Hent korrespondanse og innhold i en RT-sak
